allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(''7iks_logo.jpg''\); print\(img.size\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\(''7iks_logo.jpg''\); print\(img.size\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const b=fs.readFileSync\(''7iks_logo.jpg''\); const w=b.readUInt16BE\(b.indexOf\(Buffer.from\(''ffc0'',''hex''\)\)+5\); const h=b.readUInt16BE\(b.indexOf\(Buffer.from\(''ffc0'',''hex''\)\)+7\); console.log\(h+''x''+w\)")
